name: Frijoles Con Queso Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Monterey Jack Cheese, grated and packed
A generous amount of Black Pepper
A generous amount of Cayenne Pepper
Dash Oregano, Basil, Salt and Pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Add cream cheese, yogurt, and Monterey Jack cheese to hot beans and mix well.
2. Saute onion, garlic, and spices in water for 5-8 minutes. Add the mixture to the bean mixture.
3. Mix the ingredients together and transfer to a greased 2-quart casserole dish.
4. Saute zucchini for 3 minutes, then add tomatoes and spices; cool. Spread on top of the bean mixture.
5. Mix together the dry ingredients for the cornbread topping. Beat yogurt and egg, then add to the dry ingredients.
6. Spread the cornbread mixture on top of the beans and vegetables.
7. Cook at 375°F (190°C) for 40 minutes.
